notes: v238 — All shares, reliably. (1) The share-list download is far tougher: all relays are tried at once instead of one-by-one, the quote list is a new fallback list source, and the last-resort AI relay can no longer deliver a silently CUT-SHORT list (that truncation is how the app got stuck at ~590 shares). If the live list is unreachable it says so plainly, shows your saved data, and keeps retrying in the background. (2) When your active load preset (gainers / min-volume) narrows a forced-live run, the message now includes a one-tap '▶ Prepare ALL now' link. (3) A forced-live refresh that fails on a slow proxy now falls back to the copy saved on this device instead of leaving '?'. Includes v237's dead-symbol skip and time-remaining estimate.
